name: obsidian-things-toolkit-plugin
description: Sync Things3 completions into Obsidian daily notes with review stats
author: yangcht

scripts.build: npm run lint && npm test && npm run typecheck && npm run test:typecheck && rollup -c
scripts.release:create: npm run build && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./manifest.json').version") && gh release create "$VERSION" main.js manifest.json styles.css --title "$VERSION" --notes "Release $VERSION"
scripts.release:upload: npm run build && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./manifest.json').version") && (gh release delete-asset "$VERSION" versions.json -y >/dev/null 2>&1 || true) && gh release upload "$VERSION" main.js manifest.json styles.css --clobber
